name: ACM-1-1
description: Access control mechanism for device functionalities

DT.ACM-1-1.ROOT.text: Does the device implement an access control mechanism for its functionalities?

DT.ACM-1-1.DN-1.text: Does the access control distinguish between different roles (e.g. user, administrator)?

DT.ACM-1-1.DN-2.text: Do the access permissions follow the principle of least privilege?

DT.ACM-1-1.PASS-1.text: The access control mechanism is correctly implemented with role separation and the principle of least privilege.

DT.ACM-1-1.FAIL-1.text: The device does not implement any access control mechanism.

DT.ACM-1-1.FAIL-2.text: The access control does not distinguish between roles: all users have the same permissions.

DT.ACM-1-1.FAIL-3.text: Permissions do not follow the principle of least privilege: risk of excessive access.
